name: step-flow
title: Step Flow
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Interactive multi-step flow visualizer with clickable step buttons, arrow connectors, detail panel, and back/next navigation. Great for checkout flows, onboarding wizards, or any sequential process.
docs: Pass an array of `steps` with `label` and `description`. Use `initialStep` to set the starting position and `onStepChange` for controlled navigation.
